name: Aktiebolaget Fastator (publ)
summary: Aktiebolaget Fastator (publ) invests in real estate companies in Sweden. The company owns community service properties, primarily, directly or indirectly, public sector tenants, such as state, municipalities, and regions. It also provides property management services. Aktiebolaget Fastator (publ) was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
